title: populus nigra f. italica
intro: Populus nigra f. italica, also known as Lombardy poplar or Italian black poplar, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its fast growth rate and distinctive columnar shape. The medicinal properties of Populus nigra f. italica lie in its bark, which contains salicylic acid and has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of using Populus nigra f. italica include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Populus nigra f. italica include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from its bark, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
